user.title: SplitFlap Gateway Companion
user.description: Enter the URL of your running SplitFlap Gateway Companion.

data_description.url: For example http://homeassistant.local:8000, or the companion's IP and port.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach a companion at that URL. Check it is running and the address is right.

abort.already_configured: This companion is already set up.

message.name: Show message
message.description: Show text on the split-flap display.

text.name: Text
text.description: The message. It is centred and word-wrapped to fit the board.

style.name: Style
style.description: Flap transition (e.g. ltr, columns, outside_in). Leave blank for the default.

seconds.name: Seconds
seconds.description: Show temporarily: after this many seconds the display returns to whatever was playing. Leave at 0 to keep the message up.
